name: ConvertFrom-StringData

options.name: -Delimiter
options.description: The character used to separate the key from the value data in the string being converted. The default delimiter is the equals sign (`=`) character. This parameter was added in PowerShell 7.

options.name: -StringData
options.description: Specifies the string to be converted. You can use this parameter or pipe a string to `ConvertFrom-StringData`. The parameter name is optional.

description: Converts a string containing one or more key and value pairs to a hash table.
